name: Key Lime Pie (Cook)
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze the juice from 4 large or 6 small Key Limes and grate the rind; set aside.
2. Beat egg yolks with a whisk until they reach a buttercup yellow color.
3. Add about half of the condensed milk using a whisk, then blend well.
4. Incorporate the remaining milk, adding it gradually.
5. Add half of the Key Lime juice and blend slowly.
6. Add the rest of the lime juice and blend thoroughly.
7. Mix in the grated rind and pour into the chilled pie crust.
8. Refrigerate for 4 hours. The pie can also be frozen.
9. To serve, slice while still frozen and let stand about 10 minutes.
10. Top with whipped cream.
